$comment: Routing table template. Model names are placeholders — bind them to your pool. The invariant is the SHAPE: task class x sensitivity -> tier, sensitivity as a hard constraint.

model_tiers.rules: no model — deterministic rule layer (regex / lookup / threshold)
model_tiers.small: cheap fast model, internal or external
model_tiers.internal_only: self-hosted model, no data leaves the boundary

routes.note: sensitivity=regulated: external tiers are forbidden by the constraint table above, whatever this route says

invariants: sensitivity_constraints are enforced BEFORE route preference — a route may never widen them
every route change goes through the eval gate (templates/eval-suite.md) before deploy
router decisions are logged with task, tier chosen, and why — auditable by ⑦
